title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant Digital Technologies - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant Digital Technologies - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
